calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER
Off Calendar Nov-08-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender, and issuance of new Birth Certificate.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Holt-Smith.
Petitioner: Thomas Crawford Sammons III, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name and gender were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Teri Lynn O'Bryon, and grants the petition for Change of Gender from Male to Female, and issuance of New Birth Certificate.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER
Off Calendar Oct-18-2007 Reset To Nov-08-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Petitioner: Thomas Crawford Sammons III fka Tammy Sammons, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
The Court continued this matter to Nov. 8, 2007 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218 for Medical Declarartion.
